Barbell Bench Press.description: A classic compound upper-body exercise where you lower a barbell to your chest and press it back up while lying flat on a bench.
formCues: Retract your shoulder blades and pin them to the bench
Keep your feet flat on the floor
Lower the bar to your mid-chest under control

Dumbbell Goblet Squat.description: A front-loaded squat variation where a single dumbbell is held vertically against the chest to encourage an upright torso.
formCues: Hold the dumbbell vertically close to your chest
Keep your elbows tucked and chest up
Push your knees out as you sink your hips
Drive through your mid-foot to stand up

Single-Arm Dumbbell Row.description: An upper body pulling exercise performed by rowing a dumbbell to the hip while supporting the torso with the opposite arm.
formCues: Keep your spine neutral and flat
Pull the dumbbell toward your hip, not your chest
Drive your elbow toward the ceiling

Recover.description: A designated rest period to recover and prepare for the next work interval.
formCues: Keep moving lightly if needed to prevent stiffness
Mentally prepare for the next effort
